mechanism: Iterative comparison of counterfactual alternatives against outcomes generates affective contrast effects modulated by cognitive goals (self-protection vs improvement). Blame assignment to stable vs unstable factors feeds back into self-esteem and motivation formation through goal-dependent interpretation of exculpatory information.

Aversive prospects become cognitively accessible via spontaneous negative imagination; accessibility magnitude predicts subjective likelihood estimates via heuristic weighting. System 1 processes (salience-driven accessibility) dominate likelihood judgments unless System 2 deliberation overrides them under low cognitive load.
domain: judgment and decision-making, heuristics, probability estimation

mechanism: Expressed vulnerabilities shape reflected appraisals (self-other alignment bias); reflected appraisals trigger prototype application (cautious responding pattern); prototype-driven doubts undermine authenticity perception via attribution bias (situational discounting). Iterative cycles perpetuate insecurity doubts despite partner's actual regard.
domain: close relationships, social perception, interpersonal judgment

mechanism: Color perception automatically activates semantic associations (red-sex link) via dual pathways: biological predisposition (estrogen-linked vascularization signal) and sociocultural conditioning. Automated affect and approach motivation follow from association retrieval; conscious override fails unless cognition is protected.

Marital quality and stability trajectories emerge from feedback loops between interaction patterns, sentiment evaluations, and contextual stressors. Attractions, barriers, and alternatives dynamically shift; change mechanisms operate through behavioral adaptation, attachment security, and coping capacity under crises. Equilibrium points reflect balance of competing forces over time.

Personality trait values modulate valence-specific affect generation through temperamental and instrumental pathways. Stable dispositions (extraversion, neuroticism) directly predict emotional baseline via neurobiological systems. Behavioral trait enactment (conscientiousness, agreeableness) shapes situational outcome frequencies, indirectly affecting domain satisfaction. Meta-level averaging produces life satisfaction across domains.
